_comment: Side feed for my own plugins. Same shape as upstream applicationFeed.json — U-Manager concatenates this onto the CA feed at fetch time.

applist.Name: UManager
applist.Author: jandrop
applist.Overview: Push notification agent for the U-Manager mobile app. Forwards Unraid notifications to your phone so you don't have to keep the web UI open.

RecommendedReason.en_US: Install this on your Unraid server to forward notifications to the U-Manager mobile app.
RecommendedReason.es_ES: Instala este plugin en el servidor para que U-Manager reciba las notificaciones.

applist.Name: U-Manager Companion
applist.Author: jandrop
applist.Overview: Monkey-patches Unraid's bundled GraphQL API at boot to expose extra data the U-Manager mobile app needs — installed-plugin manifest metadata, network device utilisation, Docker stats, parity-check resume, power mutations and more. Required on the Unraid server for the app to show the full picture.

RecommendedReason.en_US: Required on the Unraid server for U-Manager to access plugin manifests, network metrics and Docker stats over GraphQL.
RecommendedReason.es_ES: Requerido en el servidor para que U-Manager acceda a los manifests de plugins, métricas de red y stats de Docker vía GraphQL.
